title: Custom Tuberack Dilutions
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs a dilution on custom tuberacks with 2x P1000 pipettes in tandem. The deck layout is shown below: ---
steps_raw: This protocol performs a dilution on custom tuberacks with 2x P1000 pipettes in tandem. The deck layout is shown below: ---
Pipette 1 aspirates 700µL from tube at position 1 on rack 1 with air gap
Pipette 2 aspirates 700µL from tube at position 2 on rack 1 with air gap
Pipette 1 dispenses full volume into tube at position 1 on rack 3
Pipette 1 aspirates 800 µL from mixed dilution tube
Pipette 1 dispenses full volume into vial at position 1 on HPLC rack at deck position 11
Pipette 2 dispenses full volume into tube at position 2 on rack 3
Pipette 2 aspirates 800 µL from mixed dilution tube
Pipette 2 dispenses full volume into vial at position 2 on HPLC rack at deck position 11
Pipette 1&2 discard tips in waste tray
Steps 1-12 are repeated for as many samples as specified, pausing for refills if more than 48 samples are input.
materials_raw: 2x Opentrons P1000 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
